ItacPersonItem.Notes: Architect. Joined the Argonauti at least from 1693, when he published Epitome cosmografica. Probably, he became `accademico eminente` in 1715. See his biography by Roswitha Hespe and Giorgio E. Ferrari, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
